policy.purpose: test whether the cycle-1 fixed result-domain capability can be authored by external packs without opening external influence

probes.kernel_need: manifest vocabulary for declaring a fixed call result domain
probes.reason: external manifests can now declare semantics.result_domain with kind=fixed and an explicit DomainEvidence vocabulary member

probes.kernel_need: reject unknown or ecosystem-specific result-domain names before influence
probes.reason: result_domain.domain is validated against the existing kernel DomainEvidence vocabulary

probes.kernel_need: fixed result-domain claims must require API occurrence evidence
probes.reason: result_domain contracts require a required LibraryApi.Contract evidence producer or evidence-kind requirement

probes.kernel_need: authorability must not bypass metadata-only/data-only external pack policy
probes.reason: fixed result-domain rows load as external contract metadata, but influence preflight still blocks them

probes.kernel_need: fixed result-domain contracts must remain eligible for fixture-expectation executable gates
probes.reason: existing executable conformance gates already target exact-capable contract rows; no new oracle primitive was needed

probes.kernel_need: package/version coordinates in the manifest
probes.reason: manifest packages already validate ecosystem/name/version shape, but they remain metadata rather than occurrence proof

probes.kernel_need: external rows must not shadow builtin ids silently
probes.reason: external row conflict reporting already covers producers, contracts, and value laws

probes.kernel_need: executable fixture gates can clear only the executable-conformance blocker
probes.reason: existing preflight keeps data-only, dependency-backed evidence, and explicit trust blockers closed

probes.kernel_need: prove a project actually depends on Guava before admitting Guava factories
probes.reason: manifest package metadata is not a lockfile/build-system occurrence producer

probes.kernel_need: prove Guava Optional identity and version before option-like rows
probes.reason: package occurrence proof remains absent and Optional has additional demand/default-effect boundaries

probes.kernel_need: prove ActiveSupport presence semantics by versioned package occurrence
probes.reason: Ruby package/version occurrence proof remains unavailable

probes.kernel_need: prove trait method identity and caller-selected Vec materialization
probes.reason: fixed result-domain authoring cannot express collect-like result selection or trait resolution

probes.kernel_need: distinguish lazy iterator adapters from materialized collections
probes.reason: demand/materialization evidence is still required before broad iterator result-domain rows

probes.kernel_need: prove scalar dtype/domain before NumPy scalar ufunc laws
probes.reason: DomainEvidence vocabulary exists, but no safe NumPy dtype producer exists

probes.kernel_need: distinguish scalar, ndarray, dtype, and broadcasting boundaries
probes.reason: fixed result-domain authoring is too coarse for array shape and dtype semantics

probes.kernel_need: external rows need a way to produce dependency-backed evidence, not just metadata
probes.reason: external manifests remain data-only; no producer runtime or trust policy opens exact influence

probes.kernel_need: user/provider trust policy before external evidence can affect exact results
probes.reason: external packs intentionally remain metadata-only and disabled by default

probes.kernel_need: do not treat manifest package claims as project occurrence proof
probes.reason: a manifest says what a pack targets, not what the analyzed project imports or depends on

probes.kernel_need: do not let fixed result-domain schema open broad HOF result domains
probes.reason: HOF result shape still needs demand/materialization and callback-effect proof

probes.kernel_need: do not let fixed result-domain schema express parametric map value domains
probes.reason: Map.get result depends on the map value type and presence/default semantics, not fixed API identity
